user.title: SAIH Ebro
user.description:
Configure access to the SAIH Ebro Open Data API.

If you do not have an API Key yet, you can request access here:
- https://www.saihebro.com/datos/opendata
- https://www.saihebro.com/usuarios/registro (write in the Remarks field that you want access to the Open Data API).

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: Select the measurement scope (river, reservoir or canal).

zone.title: Zone
zone.description: Select the zone inside the chosen scope.

categories.title: Data types
categories.description: Choose which data types you want for the selected stations.

signals.title: Signals
signals.description: Optionally refine by selecting specific signals.

error.station_required: You must select at least one station.
error.category_required: You must select at least one data type.
error.invalid_api_key: Unable to validate the API Key. Please check it.
